steps.title: Use the root product
steps.content:
The product of the solutions is $\frac{c}{a}$. Here, $a=\frac{1}{62}$ and $c=-st$.
$$\frac{c}{a}=\frac{-st}{\frac{1}{62}}=-62st$$

steps.title: Match the given form
steps.content:
Set the products equal and solve for $k$.
$$-62st=-2kst$$
$$62=2k$$
$$k=31$$
The answer is 31.
